privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Clash of Clans would like permission to track you across apps and websites owned by other companies.\n\nYour data will be used for audience insights, analytics and improving our services.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo library access is needed if player wants to send screenshots to Supercell Player Support.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is needed for scanning QR codes.
Camera access is needed to scan QR codes.

privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Allow tracking to get ads and offers on this app and ads for our games in other apps. We also use your data to generate audience insights, perform analytics and improve our services.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo library access is needed if player contacts Supercell Player Support to send screenshots.
